title: Matera, Basilicata — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Matera, Basilicata: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Matera is a city in Basilicata with a population of 60,000. A UNESCO World Heritage city famous for its ancient Sassi cave dwellings, a European Capital of Culture with an otherworldly landscape.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
